name: Weave
description:
Weave is a customer review software that helps send review requests, respond to reviews, allows real-time review monitoring, comes with an AI-assistant that helps respond to reviews efficiently. 

‍

Source: Website

Features:

➡️Helps collect reviews in a centralized dashboard

➡️Real-time monitoring of reviews 

➡️AI assistant to respond 

Pros:

✅Weave offers a robust set of features 

✅Integrations are very seamless 

✅Has AI features to respond to reviews 

Cons:

❌No search filters 

❌Takes too long to sync contacts and add contacts from databases 

❌Can’t send out a mass text or a mass email to customers
what_people_say:
“I LOVE the ease of use and how it links everything to weave. I can even get reviews directly to google or FB. And that really makes it easy to build up our reviews.”

‍

“Very unreiable automessaging. Weekly failures of the system requiring calls to get support to restore functionality. Very time consuming and frustrating. No explanation from Weave about why the problems are fixed and then repeatedly fail week after week.

In addition, the desk app interface is very small, the size of a cell phone screen. We've requested that this be increase and made scalable since we started using Weave, but they haven't changed it.”

*Review sourced and cited by G2*
